__rationale__: Passing fixture for SR-01: Total synthesis length within vendor-specific bounds. Twist gene fragments: 300–5 000 bp. Twist clonal genes: 300–5 000 bp. IDT gBlocks: 125–3 000 bp. IDT gBlocks HiFi: ≤ 5 000 bp. GenScript standard gene: ≤ ~10 000 bp.

construct.notes: T-405 fixture asserts rule-registry coverage; Phase 5/6 replaces stub semantics with executable predicate expectations.
